index.description: Improve a working thing along one axis (cost / speed / quality / reliability). Output is a measurable delta. Performance tuning, cost-cutting sweeps, conversion-rate experiments, latency reductions, code refactors, test-suite cleanups.

playbook.summary: Once a year (or semi-annually for high-growth orgs), audit our delivery practice across all active projects, identify top systemic friction, and ship a concrete improvement program for the next cycle.

"Full technical + content SEO audit, AI-overview readiness review, refresh of top-30 pages, cannibalization cleanup, internal-link rewiring, and 12-month forward plan. 'Done' = audit report delivere..."
Cloud bill cut by a measurable target (e.
"2-week concentrated sprint to clear design drift: inconsistent components retired, microcopy normalized, a11y quick wins shipped."
"When p95 latency creeps up or a feature is borderline: profile the hot path end-to-end (retriever → rerank → model → tools) and ship one latency cut."
"Pick one topic cluster, end up with: pillar receives links from every supporter, supporters cross-link sensibly, no orphan, no over-linked anchor. Re-run cluster-by- cluster on a rotation."
"One identified hot path (endpoint / page / job) has a measured baseline, a tested change, and a measured delta. Either ship the win or document why we won't."
Performance test run + analysis. Single load/perf run against a target SLO; produce a verdict (ship / hold / investigate) backed by numbers, not vibes.
Repo pre-commit config catches the class of error that last bit the team in the past 30 days. New rule is documented, agreed by team, and CI mirrors local hooks.
Static pricing → one variable flipped for 14 days with a measured paid-conversion delta.

"BA-led continuous improvement programme on an existing internal or client process: measure baseline, design future state, pilot, roll out, lock in benefits. End state — measurable KPI shift with su..."
Production inference cost optimization sweep. Cut LLM spend on a live product by a target percentage (e.g.

"Pre-existing system promoted from staging-quality to true production: SLOs defined, alerts deduped, secrets rotated, backups verified, security gates blocking, capacity headroom proven, runbooks pu..."
A product team dedicates a focused 2-week interval to paying down structurally important debt, with clear before/after metrics.
Fixed corpus + frozen test queries → decide which chunking + retrieval combo wins this week and ship the winner behind a flag.

"Regression suite hardening: flaky test elimination. Done when: CI flake rate < 1% sustained for 4 weeks, every quarantined test has a triage owner + ETA, no test is muted without a tracked root-cau..."

"Instead of a roadmap drift through 'features stakeholders shouted loudest about', PM picks one customer journey, finds the worst bottleneck via funnel plus qualitative data, and runs a one-quarter..."

A growth team or solopreneur runs one disciplined landing-page experiment per week (hypothesis → variant → traffic split → readout → rollout/kill) with cumulative compounding lift logged in an expe...
A neglected codebase is brought from low / uneven test coverage to a defensible, layered test pyramid that protects deploys.
"Test pyramid rebalance: too-many-e2e to contract + unit. Existing suite dominated by slow flaky e2e."
"One module is measurably cleaner after the session: smaller functions, removed dead code, types tightened, OR an extracted seam that unblocks a follow-up. NO behavior change, all tests still green."

Unflake and parallelize a slow E2E suite. Cut wall-clock E2E time and flake rate in half — combine flake-elimination methodology, deterministic test data, sharded parallelization, visual regression...
"Vector store latency or recall is off: tune index, filters, hybrid retrieval; ship or document why current setup is optimal."
